records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! They're over there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! They're over there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! They're over there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've prepared this operation meticulously by excluding all variables.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've prepared this operation meticulously by excluding all variables.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've prepared this operation meticulously by excluding all variables.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We analyzed it in many ways, and even calculated all the possible cases.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We analyzed it in many ways, and even calculated all the possible cases.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We analyzed it in many ways, and even calculated all the possible cases.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We deployed ships where the success rates were the highest and aimed at the enemy's rear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We deployed ships where the success rates were the highest and aimed at the enemy's rear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We deployed ships where the success rates were the highest and aimed at the enemy's rear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how did this happen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how did this happen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how did this happen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There definitely weren't any issues with Terrabrain's predictions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There definitely weren't any issues with Terrabrain's predictions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There definitely weren't any issues with Terrabrain's predictions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was plenty of time for us to review the predictions.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was plenty of time for us to review the predictions.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was plenty of time for us to review the predictions.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which leaves us with that someone must have intervened to create a variable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which leaves us with that someone must have intervened to create a variable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which leaves us with that someone must have intervened to create a variable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But who...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But who...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But who...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>He cannot drive out the demons without borrowing the power of the demon leader.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>He cannot drive out the demons without borrowing the power of the demon leader.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>He cannot drive out the demons without borrowing the power of the demon leader.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>The foolish do not see the flow of the world.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>The foolish do not see the flow of the world.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>The foolish do not see the flow of the world.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>We all become our Master's compound eyes and see the world with the eyes of an observer.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>We all become our Master's compound eyes and see the world with the eyes of an observer.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>We all become our Master's compound eyes and see the world with the eyes of an observer.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>For that is the path to purify the world according to the great one.</color>94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>For that is the path to purify the world according to the great one.</color>94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>For that is the path to purify the world according to the great one.</color>94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is highly likely that all our electronics, including our comms, have been infected with the data corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is highly likely that all our electronics, including our comms, have been infected with the data corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is highly likely that all our electronics, including our comms, have been infected with the data corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, be cautious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, be cautious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, be cautious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I killed them all. My carelessness... Just one wrong call, and everyone...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I killed them all. My carelessness... Just one wrong call, and everyone...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I killed them all. My carelessness... Just one wrong call, and everyone...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We looked into all the possible outcomes for this operation. This must mean that there was an intervention from an entity beyond the calculation.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: We looked into all the possible outcomes for this operation. This must mean that there was an intervention from an entity beyond the calculation.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: We looked into all the possible outcomes for this operation. This must mean that there was an intervention from an entity beyond the calculation.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps this ritual is to summon such a being.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps this ritual is to summon such a being.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps this ritual is to summon such a being.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no time to waste. Aditya. We must move forward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no time to waste. Aditya. We must move forward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no time to waste. Aditya. We must move forward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Dammit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Dammit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Dammit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: First, let's gather information to pass on to allies who may arrive later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: First, let's gather information to pass on to allies who may arrive later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: First, let's gather information to pass on to allies who may arrive later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the ritual began, the Counterside Effect occurred from the center of the ritual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the ritual began, the Counterside Effect occurred from the center of the ritual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the ritual began, the Counterside Effect occurred from the center of the ritual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This kind of Counterside Effect changing the landscape into a devastated desert city has never been reported before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This kind of Counterside Effect changing the landscape into a devastated desert city has never been reported before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This kind of Counterside Effect changing the landscape into a devastated desert city has never been reported before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The objective of the ritual is... still unknown.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The objective of the ritual is... still unknown.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The objective of the ritual is... still unknown.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The current damage of the situation is... that we expect all but the few who were sent out to evacuate the civilians to die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The current damage of the situation is... that we expect all but the few who were sent out to evacuate the civilians to die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The current damage of the situation is... that we expect all but the few who were sent out to evacuate the civilians to die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, data corruption is occurring in our radio and electronic devices.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, data corruption is occurring in our radio and electronic devices.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, data corruption is occurring in our radio and electronic devices.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the Society involved, we assume that this is linked to <color=#ffd34c>Gha'agsheblah</color>, but have not jumped to any conclusions.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the Society involved, we assume that this is linked to <color=#ffd34c>Gha'agsheblah</color>, but have not jumped to any conclusions.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the Society involved, we assume that this is linked to <color=#ffd34c>Gha'agsheblah</color>, but have not jumped to any conclusions.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: Qlipha Imaginary Energy density is continually rising across the city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Qlipha Imaginary Energy density is continually rising across the city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Qlipha Imaginary Energy density is continually rising across the city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ally forces are... assumed to have... mutated... while retreating...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ally forces are... assumed to have... mutated... while retreating...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ally forces are... assumed to have... mutated... while retreating...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dammit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dammit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dammit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe some are still alive and have not mutated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe some are still alive and have not mutated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe some are still alive and have not mutated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The remaining troops must leave quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The remaining troops must leave quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The remaining troops must leave quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I need to
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I need to
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I need to
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: An earthquake...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An earthquake...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An earthquake...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: C.O. detected! It's coming up from the ground!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C.O. detected! It's coming up from the ground!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O. detected! It's coming up from the ground!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...a whale.94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...a whale.94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...a whale.94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is bad. It is a type of C.O. that I've never seen before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is bad. It is a type of C.O. that I've never seen before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is bad. It is a type of C.O. that I've never seen before.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
In order to figure out its attack pattern
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
In order to figure out its attack pattern
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
In order to figure out its attack pattern
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Qlipha Imaginary Energy is rising too quickly! I-if this continues...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Qlipha Imaginary Energy is rising too quickly! I-if this continues...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Qlipha Imaginary Energy is rising too quickly! I-if this continues...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: T-tentacles on my body...! S-someone cut these off from me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: T-tentacles on my body...! S-someone cut these off from me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: T-tentacles on my body...! S-someone cut these off from me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shoot them all! It's too late for the ones that have started to mutate!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shoot them all! It's too late for the ones that have started to mutate!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shoot them all! It's too late for the ones that have started to mutate!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good morning! I hope your purifying ends safely today!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good morning! I hope your purifying ends safely today!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good morning! I hope your purifying ends safely today!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today's mission is stopping the Society. Innocent citizens might get caught up, so their evacuation must be done quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today's mission is stopping the Society. Innocent citizens might get caught up, so their evacuation must be done quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today's mission is stopping the Society. Innocent citizens might get caught up, so their evacuation must be done quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This flagship has the state-of-the-art Black Hole Drive equipped...
records.m_Talk_DEU: This flagship has the state-of-the-art Black Hole Drive equipped...
records.m_Talk_FRA: This flagship has the state-of-the-art Black Hole Drive equipped...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Who are you
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Who are you
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Who are you
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're in danger! Come this way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're in danger! Come this way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're in danger! Come this way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Are you two all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Are you two all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Are you two all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not like you to space out in such a dangerous situation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not like you to space out in such a dangerous situation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not like you to space out in such a dangerous situation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That C.O., something's strange about it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That C.O., something's strange about it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That C.O., something's strange about it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was for a brief moment, but I felt as if my consciousness was connected to it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was for a brief moment, but I felt as if my consciousness was connected to it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was for a brief moment, but I felt as if my consciousness was connected to it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your consciousness and the C.O.'s...? What did you see in it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your consciousness and the C.O.'s...? What did you see in it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your consciousness and the C.O.'s...? What did you see in it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I saw memories of <color=#ff3636>people I've never met before</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I saw memories of <color=#ff3636>people I've never met before</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I saw memories of <color=#ff3636>people I've never met before</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... They didn't feel unfamiliar. How can that be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... They didn't feel unfamiliar. How can that be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... They didn't feel unfamiliar. How can that be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think now's the time to solve that puzzle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think now's the time to solve that puzzle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think now's the time to solve that puzzle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are here to purify the C.O. Such a simple operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are here to purify the C.O. Such a simple operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are here to purify the C.O. Such a simple operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's get moving. We'll think about what it is later, all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's get moving. We'll think about what it is later, all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's get moving. We'll think about what it is later, all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's odd that <color=#ff3636>this operation only deployed the three of us</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's odd that <color=#ff3636>this operation only deployed the three of us</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's odd that <color=#ff3636>this operation only deployed the three of us</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah. Terrabrain's never wrong, though.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah. Terrabrain's never wrong, though.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah. Terrabrain's never wrong, though.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still. Something feels off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still. Something feels off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still. Something feels off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What was the Society thinking of doing <color=#ff3636>in a city where nobody lives</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What was the Society thinking of doing <color=#ff3636>in a city where nobody lives</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What was the Society thinking of doing <color=#ff3636>in a city where nobody lives</color>?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good morning! I hope your purifying ends safely today!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good morning! I hope your purifying ends safely today!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good morning! I hope your purifying ends safely today!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today's mission is stopping the Society. Innocent citizens might get caught up, so their evacuation must be done quickly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Today's mission is stopping the Society. Innocent citizens might get caught up, so their evacuation must be done quickly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Today's mission is stopping the Society. Innocent citizens might get caught up, so their evacuation must be done quickly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This flagship has the state-of-the-art Black Hole Drive equipped...
root.m_Talk_DEU: This flagship has the state-of-the-art Black Hole Drive equipped...
root.m_Talk_FRA: This flagship has the state-of-the-art Black Hole Drive equipped...

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Who are you
8v?

Who are you
8v?

Who are you
8v?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're in danger! Come this way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're in danger! Come this way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're in danger! Come this way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Are you two all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Are you two all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Are you two all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not like you to space out in such a dangerous situation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not like you to space out in such a dangerous situation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not like you to space out in such a dangerous situation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That C.O., something's strange about it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That C.O., something's strange about it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That C.O., something's strange about it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was for a brief moment, but I felt as if my consciousness was connected to it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was for a brief moment, but I felt as if my consciousness was connected to it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was for a brief moment, but I felt as if my consciousness was connected to it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your consciousness and the C.O.'s...? What did you see in it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your consciousness and the C.O.'s...? What did you see in it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your consciousness and the C.O.'s...? What did you see in it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Memories.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Memories.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Memories.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I saw memories of <color=#ff3636>people I've never met before</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I saw memories of <color=#ff3636>people I've never met before</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I saw memories of <color=#ff3636>people I've never met before</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... They didn't feel unfamiliar. How can that be?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... They didn't feel unfamiliar. How can that be?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... They didn't feel unfamiliar. How can that be?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think now's the time to solve that puzzle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think now's the time to solve that puzzle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think now's the time to solve that puzzle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We are here to purify the C.O. Such a simple operation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We are here to purify the C.O. Such a simple operation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We are here to purify the C.O. Such a simple operation.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's get moving. We'll think about what it is later, all right?

root.m_Talk_FRA: It's odd that <color=#ff3636>this operation only deployed the three of us</color>.
